features.name: Oath Spells
features.description: Your oath grants always-prepared spells at 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th level (protection from evil and good, sanctuary, and more).

features.name: Sacred Weapon
features.description: Channel Divinity: for 1 minute, add your Charisma modifier to attack rolls with one weapon, which emits bright light and counts as magical.

features.name: Turn the Unholy
features.description: Channel Divinity: each fiend or undead within 30 feet that can see or hear you must succeed on a Wisdom save or be turned for 1 minute.

features.name: Aura of Devotion
features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet can't be charmed while you are conscious.

features.name: Aura of Devotion
features.description: Your Aura of Devotion extends to 30 feet.

features.name: Purity of Spirit
features.description: You are always under the effects of a protection from evil and good spell.

features.name: Holy Nimbus
features.description: As an action, emanate an aura of sunlight for 1 minute: bright light to 30 feet, enemies starting their turn in it take 10 radiant damage, and you have advantage on saves against spells cast by fiends or undead. Once per long rest.

featureChoices.name: Fighting Style
featureChoices.description: Adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

options.name: Dueling
options.description: +2 damage when wielding a one-handed melee weapon and no other weapon.

options.name: Great Weapon Fighting
options.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice of two-handed or versatile melee weapons.

options.name: Protection
options.description: Reaction while holding a shield: impose disadvantage on an attack against a creature within 5 feet.

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: As an action, until the end of your next turn, know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet not behind total cover, and detect consecrated or desecrated places. Uses: 1 + Charisma modifier per long rest.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: A pool of healing power: restore hit points up to 5 times your paladin level per long rest, or spend 5 points to cure a disease or neutralize a poison. No effect on undead or constructs.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a combat style (defense, dueling, great weapon fighting, or protection).

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You cast paladin spells using Charisma; you prepare Charisma modifier + half your paladin level spells each day.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, expend a spell slot to deal 2d8 extra radiant damage, +1d8 per slot level above 1st (max 5d8), +1d8 against undead or fiends.

features.name: Divine Health
features.description: The divine magic flowing through you makes you immune to disease.

features.name: Sacred Oath
features.description: Your oath (sworn at 3rd level) grants oath spells, Channel Divinity options, and features at 3rd, 7th, 15th, and 20th level.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet add your Charisma modifier (minimum +1) to saving throws while you are conscious.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: Your Aura of Protection extends to 30 feet.

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet can't be frightened while you are conscious.

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.description: Your Aura of Courage extends to 30 feet.

features.name: Improved Divine Smite
features.description: Your melee weapon strikes carry divine power: all your melee weapon hits deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

features.name: Cleansing Touch
features.description: As an action, end one spell on yourself or a willing creature you touch. Uses equal your Charisma modifier (minimum 1) per long rest.
